summary: Deploy Salesforce metadata intelligently with automatic wave generation
description: Analyzes your Salesforce metadata, generates deployment waves based on dependencies, and executes the deployment sequentially. This command orchestrates the entire smart deployment workflow.
flags.source-path.summary: Path to the Salesforce project to analyze and deploy
flags.source-path.description: Defaults to the current working directory when omitted
flags.allow-cycle-remediation.summary: Allow conservative cycle remediation for supported ApexClass cycles
flags.allow-cycle-remediation.descriptio: Applies temporary reversible source edits for simple cycles only
flags.use-ai.summary: Use AI for intelligent priority weighting and dependency inference
flags.use-ai.description: Enables provider-backed analysis for deployment prioritization
flags.org-type.summary: Organization type context for AI analysis
flags.industry.description: Provides business context to AI for better prioritization
